title: No Man Without Money
content:
No man such rare parts hath, that he can swim,
    If favour or occasion help not him.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "No Man Without Money", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
